Name: HGST, a Western Digital brand
Description:
HGST has been acquired by Western Digital. Please visit Western Digital's company page for the latest company information.

HGST is a global leader in data storage, unlocking potential by helping the world harness the power of data. With a deep understanding of industry needs and a changing technology landscape, HGST is driving data center transformation with innovative, proven, smarter storage solutions that optimize capacity, performance, efficiency and reliability with the lowest TCO. Trusted by the world’s largest organizations, HGST’S storage solutions are everywhere, touching lives and enabling possibilities for the enterprise, cloud computing and sophisticated infrastructures in healthcare, energy, finance and government. www.hgst.com

We have manufacturing locations in the U.S., Singapore, Thailand, the Philippines and China. Development laboratories are located in San Jose, CA and Rochester, MN, USA; and in Odawara and Fujisawa, Japan. Our sales and technical support offices are strategically located throughout Europe, Asia and North America.

Our vision is to lead with innovative and reliable solutions which empower people to create, manage, experience and preserve digital content. 

Our mission is to sustainably deliver the industry's best customer experience through innovation, product breadth, quality and operational excellence.

Some of our posts include forward-looking statements.  For more information, read our disclaimer: http://www.hgst.com/forward-looking-statements

Name: Elo Touch Solutions
Description:
Elo is a global leader in touchscreen solutions, including modern point of sale systems and interactive digital signage, sized 7 to 65 inches. The pioneer of the touchscreen, Elo now has 35+ million retail and hospitality installations in 80+ countries with products designed in California and built to last with a three-year standard warranty. The Elo touchscreen experience has consistently stood for quality, reliability and innovation. 

The Elo portfolio encompasses the broadest selection of OEM touch screen components, touch monitors, and all-in-one touch computers for the demanding requirements of diverse markets, including gaming machines, hospitality systems, industrial automation, interactive kiosks, healthcare, office equipment, point of sale terminals, retail displays, and transportation applications.  

For more information on Elo products and services, please call 800-ELO-TOUCH, email EloSales.NA@elotouch.com or visit us on the web at EloTouch.com.

Name: Apex Semiconductor
Description:
Apex Semiconductor is revolutionizing silicon realization. Apex delivers hyper-efficient ASIC solutions and development platforms to accelerate your world.

Founded in 2018 by a team of Silicon Valley veterans with over 25 years of experience, we have a proven track record in delivering complex, high-performance, and low-power chip and system designs using bleeding-edge process technology nodes.

At Apex, we’re building an AI-powered chip design software and methodology along with an interchip enablement technology to revolutionize the economics of SoC design and path to production for our customers. We extensively use this platform to provide customers with full turnkey ASIC implementation all the way to production. Apex’s software runs alongside existing EDA tools and uses a combination of predictive analysis and learning from human-based best practices, both of which minimize design iterations and reduce time spent by human experts on analyzing tool-generated reports. Our in-house data science team is equipped with world-class AI experts with semiconductor backgrounds and key related patents, positioning us very well to help disrupt the economics of SoC realization.
Apex Semiconductor is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA with offices in India and Malaysia.

Name: x-kom
Description:
Lata doświadczeń, nieustanny rozwój i reputacja, której inni mogą nam tylko pozazdrościć. Prężnie i systematycznie rozbudowując swoją działalność jedną rzecz niezmiennie stawiamy na pierwszym miejscu: niepodważalny priorytet, jakim jest dla nas Twoja satysfakcja z dokonanych zakupów.

Kiedy w 2002 roku otworzyliśmy swój pierwszy stacjonarny salon komputerowy, szybko zaczęły do nas docierać sygnały, że od konkurencji odróżnia nas podstawowa sprawa: zdecydowanie wyższa jakość obsługi. Nigdy nie zrezygnowaliśmy z otwartości w stosunku do naszych klientów. Efekt? Należymy dziś do najlepiej ocenianych polskich sklepów internetowych. Miło nam, że jesteście tak bardzo zadowoleni z przeprowadzonych u nas transakcji.

Name: System76
Description:
System76 is the leading provider of Linux laptops, desktops, and servers. We work in beautiful Denver, Colorado. System76 offers health benefits, paid vacation, matching 401k, and an awesome work environment where smart people are free to push their creativity.

Recently, we launched our new desktop Thelio. A beautifully crafted design with Colorado mountains, real wood, and an exhaust grill designed to depict the planetary system at the start of the Unix Epoch. Join our team and make great things with us.

Name: Posiflex Technology (India) Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Posiflex is a global leader in designing and manufacturing Point of Sale (POS) management systems, PC, and peripheral OEM/ODM products. With the well-established India operation since 1997, Posiflex has been recognized as the leading POS company in the country for its uncompromised product quality and assured after-sales services to its customers.

Started as a PC and PC peripherals design and manufacturing company, Posiflex later forayed into the POS industry and evolved as the leading POS terminal and POS-related peripheral manufacturers serving multiple domains across the globe. Posiflex designs and manufactures all brand products in Taiwan's own IOS-certified laboratory and factories. All stages of production, from R&D and design to manufacturing, are done internally by Posiflex. The products have been honored by many national and international awards and with over 30 patents worldwide, covering secure, integrative, flexible, and easy-to-use features. 

Posiflex's POS systems are designed to fulfill customers' one-stop shopping requirements. It possesses the advantages of open architectures and cross-platform integration. Posiflex Technology India has the highest acceptance by Global, National, and Regional Brands across all retail, hospitality, manufacturing, and healthcare formats and has a base of over 2lac+ POS terminals and peripherals being installed to date, covering metro to tier-3 cities. 

Adhering to a people-oriented and customer-centric principle, Posiflex continues to seek excellence across R&D, design, and manufacturing processes to create user-friendly interfaces and technical features, thereby enabling the POS industry to develop and transform from conventional mechanical operations to user-friendly technical interfaces. Posiflex follows 4R Quality policy - Revolutionary Technology, Reliable Quality, Reasonable Price, and Recognized Service to offer the best-in-class customer experience.

Name: Eurotech
Description:
Eurotech is a multinational company that designs, develops and supplies Edge Computers and Internet of Things (IoT) solutions - complete with services, software and hardware - to system integrators and enterprises. 

By adopting Eurotech solutions, customers have access to IoT building blocks and software platforms, to Edge Gateway to enable asset monitoring and to High Performance Edge Computers (HPEC) created also for Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications. 

To offer increasingly comprehensive solutions, Eurotech has partnered with leading companies in their field of action, with the view of creating "best in class" solutions for the Industrial Internet of Things.

Name: SGI
Description: SGI, the trusted leader in high performance computing (HPC), was focused on helping customers solve their most demanding business and technology challenges by delivering technical computing, Big Data analytics, cloud computing, and petascale storage solutions that accelerate time to discovery, innovation, and profitability.

Name: Quantum Motion
Description: Quantum Motion is developing a revolutionary technology platform; not just a qubit, but a scalable array of qubits fabricated on silicon with a CMOS compatible process.

Name: Advantech USA
Description: Advantech is the global leader of embedded, industrial, IoT and automation solution platforms. The 35-year-old, billion-dollar business is ranked a top 100 Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) company, with over 1,000 products and more than 8,000 employees working in 92 major cities worldwide. Advantech is renowned for developing and manufacturing high-quality, high-performance hardware and software computing components as well as complete platforms—focused on its vision of enabling an intelligent planet. Advantech is a subsidiary of Advantech Co., Ltd.

Name: Evolis
Description: Evolis, the worldwide leader, develops, manufactures and markets a complete range of personalization solutions for plastic cards (personal data printing and all encoding options). The Company markets also a full line of products and services for identifying people and goods: software, accessories, signature pads and services.

Name: EVGA
Description: EVGA is the #1 NVIDIA authorized partner in channel sales throughout North America. Based on the philosophy of intelligent innovation, market knowledge, and the real time operation, EVGA continues to identify the need in the market place and providing the solution to that need. By offering product differentiation, 24/7 tech support, a 90 day Step-Up program, and other customer focused programs, EVGA is a clear leader in all categories: etail, retail, distribution, and system builders. With headquarters in Brea, CA, EVGA's global coverage includes EVGA GmbH in Munich, EVGA LATAM in Miami, and EVGA Hong Kong. For further information online about EVGA, visit http://www.evga.com

Name: MiTAC Computing
Description: MiTAC Computing Technology Corporation, a subsidiary of MiTAC Holdings Corporation, is a global leader in IT solutions and has over three decades of experience. Specializing in cutting-edge edge-to-cloud solutions, we offer expertise across research and development, manufacturing, testing, supply chain management, and more. With a strong focus on server development and computing hardware, we design high-performance solutions powered by Intel and AMD processors. As we integrate the TYAN brand into one unified MiTAC identity, we continue to innovate and drive digital transformation for businesses worldwide.

Name: HaptX Inc.
Description: Founded in 2012 by Jake Rubin and Dr. Robert Crockett, HaptX builds technology that simulates touch with unprecedented realism. HaptX Gloves enable natural interaction and realistic haptic feedback in virtual reality and robotics for the first time. HaptX is a venture-backed startup with offices in San Luis Obispo, CA and Seattle, WA.

Name: Fanatec
Description: Fanatec is fully focused on markets for virtual racing (SimRacing) and offers a wide variety steering wheels, high quality pedals, shifters, cockpits and much more.

Name: Ceremorphic, Inc.
Description:
Ceremorphic has built a new architecture that delivers the performance required for next generation applications such as AI model training, HPC, drug discovery and metaverse processing. Designed with advanced silicon geometry, our architecture solves high-performance computing needs in reliability, security and power consumption at scale. 

Ceremorphic is backed by an extensive patent portfolio and in-house R&D expertise, creating a new computing paradigm that will move the industry forward for many years to come.

Name: Advantech Brasil
Description: Fundada em 1983, a Advantech tem a visão corporativa de "Possibilitar um Planeta Inteligente". A empresa é líder global nas áreas de sistemas inteligentes de IoT e plataformas embarcadas. Para abraçar as tendências de IoT, big data e inteligência artificial, a Advantech promove soluções de hardware e software de IoT com Edge Intelligence para auxiliar parceiros de negócios e clientes na conexão de cadeias industriais. A Advantech também se dedica a trabalhar com parceiros focados no domínio para co-criar soluções que oferecem soluções avançadas em IoT Industrial.

Name: SIG SYSTEMS PVT. LTD.
Description:
Founded in 1987 as Software Innovation Group, we began our journey with a simple desire to help a friend secure a desktop for his temporary requirements. What started as a small tailor-made software organization quickly discovered a growing need for reliable IT infrastructure solutions. By 1996, we evolved into SIG SYSTEMS PVT. LTD., establishing ourselves as a trusted partner in IT infrastructure rental solution across India. Based in Delhi, we specialize in a wide range of offerings, including laptops, desktop, workstation to servers and GPU rental services, all tailored to meet the diverse needs of businesses in today’s dynamic tech landscape.

Our vision is to foster a supportive environment for the tech industry and startups, making it easier for them to access essential IT hardware—from laptop, desktops to powerful servers. Recently, we have launched a dedicated vertical for rental GPU server rental services to meet the increasing demand for high-performance computing resources that empower both established and emerging companies in artificial intelligence and machine learning, providing the computational resources necessary for innovation.
At SIG SYSTEMS, we are also deeply committed to sustainability. By offering IT hardware rental services, we promote the sharing of resources, which helps reduce electronic waste and lower carbon footprints. Our initiatives aim to contribute to a greener environment and a more sustainable future for technology.
Driven by a commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, we deliver innovative and reliable solutions that enable organizations to thrive. Join us in shaping the future of technology with efficient, scalable IT infrastructure solutions that respect and protect our planet.

Name: Wacom
Description:
This account is for message delivery only. For product support or inquiries, please visit the Wacom Support page: http://bit.ly/3z9vqeO. Thank you for your understanding.
このアカウントは配信専用です。製品サポートやご質問は恐れ入りますがワコムサポートページ（http://bit.ly/3z9vqeO）をご確認いただけますよう、お願いいたします。

(English follows Japanese)
1983年に設立以来、ワコムは長年にわたり、初心者からプロフェッショナルまで幅広いクリエーターに愛される、クリエイティブ・ユーザー向けのペン・ディスプレイおよびタブレット市場におけるグローバル・リーダーとして認識されています。ワコムのールにより、デザイナー、アーティスト、アイディア・クリエーターたちの創造性を最大に引き出すとともに、映画、3Dアニメ、産業デザイン、デジタルアート、ゲーム開発など、新たな地平を切り拓くサポートも行っています。
同時に、ワコムは、スマートフォン、タブレット、デジタル文具を使用・制作する幅広いパートナーに最先端のデジタル・インク・ソリューションを提供するテクノロジーカンパニーでもあり、従来の筆記用具の感覚で直感的に使えるワコムのデジタルペンは、数多くの電子機器ならびにペン対応スマートフォンやタブレットのインターフェースとしてユーザーの間で支持を広げてきました。ワコムのペンとインクのテクノロジーが搭載されたスマートフォンの数は累計で1億台を超えています。
今後もワコムは、ビジネスの成長をしっかりと追求するとともに、 「Life-long Ink」のビジョンのもと、お客様や様々なコミュ ニティのパートナーの皆様とともに「意味深い成長」 （Meaningful Growth）を目指します。

Founded in 1983, Wacom, a global company based in Japan (Tokyo Stock Exchange 6727), has been recognized as a global leader in the market for pen displays and tablets for creative users, loved by beginners and professionals alike. Wacom tools help designers, artists and idea creators maximize their creativity and break new ground in film, 3D animation, industrial design, digital art, and game development.
At the same time, Wacom is a technology company that provides innovative digital ink solutions to a wide range of partners who use and create smartphones, tablets, and digital stationery. Wacom digital pens, which are as intuitive to use as traditional writing utensils, have become the interface for a growing number of electronic devices and pen-enabled smartphones and tablets. The total number of smartphones with Wacom pen and ink technology exceeds 100 million.
Going forward, Wacom will continue to firmly pursue business growth and aim for “Meaningful Growth” together with our customers and various community partners under the vision of “Life-long Ink.”

Name: Datapath
Description:
Delivering world-class innovation in computer graphics, video capture, and digital display technology since 1982, Datapath serves customers in over 100 countries. Serving industries including professional AV, military, education, security, and healthcare, we operate from our headquarters in Derby, UK, with additional offices in the USA, France, Japan, and China. Guided by deep customer insight, continuous improvement, and an unwavering commitment to quality, our solutions are Excellent by Design.

Proudly entering a new era as we join with VITEC, we are positioned to accelerate innovation and offer an expanded range of solutions, features, and services—empowering our customers to achieve more with the most advanced technology available.

Name: Cargil Solutions Limited
Description:
Cargil Solutions are unique in their approach to office equipment distribution. In an industry where all other distributors act as box shifters, Cargil offer a unique package.

By taking a partnership approach, Cargil offer support to its dealers through the entire sales cycle and technical support throughout the life of each product.

In order to bring value to their dealers Cargil provide an extensive range of services, alongside offering their dealers access to award winning hardware ranges from leading manufacturers Cargil also provide ; field based account managers to assist in all areas of the sales cycle; marketing funding ; on site maintenance contracts ; technician training ; dealer technical helpline.

Our portfolio includes a wide variety of devices to the channel, including ; multi functional devices, photocopiers, facsimile machines, scanners, folders, inserters, shredders and franking machines. Cargil supply all relevant consumables to support their portfolio and also a wide range of consumables for other products.

Cargil Solutions offer their dealers the chance to add to their competitive edge by complimenting the primary brands they already take to market and providing additional revenue streams to those currently being optimised.

Cargil Solutions is an IT services company, founded with the mission to provide objective, cutting-edge technology at competitive rates to our clients. Cargil has emerged as a powerful, service oriented company with vast industry knowledge and expertise to meet diverse Information Technology needs.

Name: Seal Shield
Description: Founded in 2006, Seal Shield introduced the industry’s first waterproof keyboard. Today Seal Shield is a world leader in the innovation, development, and manufacturing of infection control solutions that support a cleaner environment, including waterproof keyboards and mice, multilayer screen protectors, and UV-C Sanitization systems for portable devices & equipment. As a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, corporate institutions, governments, food services, education facilities, and vulnerable organizations are demanding these solutions more than ever before. Our technologies offer products compatible with medical-grade cleaners and disinfectants as well as mobile device management and UV-C sanitization compliance. When combined, Seal Shield products provide the most complete solution available for maintaining hygienic environements.

Name: FDC International FZCO
Description:
Founded in 1989, FDC is one of the largest IT Distribution companies in the region with over 200 qualified professionals.
 
FDC International has a full suite of products comprising Notebooks, Tablets, Hard Drives, Motherboards, Graphic cards, Optical storage drive, Digital storage, Networking products, Security software and Memory solutions; and is leading distributor of IT products for the region such as Acer, Lenovo, ASUS, Western Digital, Seagate, XFX, nVidia, Intel, AMD, TP-Link, Synology, Crucial, Kingston, Shuttle, ESET, Energizer.

We strive to build long term relationships based on mutual trust resulting from meeting customer expectations. 

FDC provides end to end solutions within the following key specialist areas:
Components Distribution
Notebook, Tablet Distribution 
Printer Distribution
Mobile accessories Distribution
Pro-Value Services
 
Each of our specialist areas are backed up by highly qualified pre-sales and post-sales support teams who handle both project implementation and after sales support. Our privileged relationship with world class vendors ensures that our customers receive best of Solutions, Services and Support.
 
Beyond our extensive range of products and solutions, the most value added benefit is the technical skills and experience of our staff. All FDC's technical staff members have both high level industry certification and in-depth experience in their respective fields.
 
Our expertise and knowledge of latest technology is always transferred to our customers.

Name: AFTERSHOCK PC
Description:
AFTERSHOCK PC is a leading custom PC company based in Singapore, Australia and Malaysia that specializes in building high-performance desktops, laptops & workstations.

AFTERSHOCK PC was founded in Singapore in 2012 and since then, we have won the top awards in the industry in Australia and Singapore cementing our reputation as the premiere PC brand in the region.

Today, with a team of over 160 people, we continue to drive our philosophy of delivering the ultimate boutique pc experience through a combination of craftsmanship, dedicated customer service and cutting-edge technology.

Follow us on instagram for the latests updates: 
instagram.com/aftershockpc

Name: 訊凱國際 Cooler Master Co., Ltd.
Description:
COOLER MASTER自1992年成立至今，不僅在專業代工提供符合客戶需求的散熱產品，同時也藉由創新設計、專業技術成為世界專業散熱領導廠商。
本公司是以顧客滿意為最終目標，透過鼓勵創新、提升研發實力和改善生產流程，提供最先進、快速的產品給客戶領先同業；將最有利的商機給合作夥伴，達到競爭力。公司能即時供應全球化市場需求，並提供顧客更好的服務品質。
歡迎各界人才加入Cooler Master，一同站上國際舞台。

 ODM/研發/製造(ODM/R&D/Manufacture): https://www.coolermastercorp.com/

Cooler Master always work toward to the best and contribute more to our customers and the communities. With more than two-decade dedication, Cooler Master managed to be a reliable and trustworthy partner for worldwide tier-1 leaders across industries.

Cooler Master is to bring out enjoyment and satisfaction in people through INNOVATION, AGILITY, and PROFESSION. We are proud of the “Cooler Master Spirit” – by treating each other with compassion and care; we value teamwork with respect and appreciation. We improve system and process with focus and discipline; we resolve problems with creativity and Innovation, and we close deals with accountability and Integrity.
Every Client is unique and exclusive, Cooler Master’s customized solutions and services that take into consideration all the needs of each client to ensure customer satisfaction and thus to develop long-term partnership through proactive engagement.

Name: ADATA Industrial
Description: As a global leader of industrial-grade memory, ADATA Industrial is devoted to provide durable and reliable industrial-grade storage products, including SSDs, memory cards, embedded storage products and DRAM modules to customers worldwide. We have a global presence and is able to offer high-quality technical and after services to customers regardless of geographic location. At the same time, ADATA Industrial is also able to leverage its R&D and manufacturing capabilities to provide customized products and solutions that meet the unique needs of individual customers. With its commitment to quality and innovation, ADATA Industrial is ready to serve the industrial sector with the widest range of memory solutions and work hand-in-hand with customers to create a better world and enrich lives. For more information, please visit industrial.adata.com.

Name: MSI France
Description:
En tant que marque leader du secteur informatique, MSI continue à placer la barre très haut en termes de design et d'innovation de ses produits de gamme Gaming. La collaboration entre les services de recherche et développement et les joueurs professionnels a permis la création de nombre des produits MSI Gaming actuellement sur le marché. 

Derrière cette envie d'innovation se trouve une détermination engagée de la part de MSI à fournir le meilleur des produits gaming à tous les joueurs. MSI est un acteur majeur sur la scène des tournois internationaux et est notamment l'hôte du tournoi Beat IT, un événement gaming reconnu dans le monde entier. Pensés pour apporter performances et puissance, les produits MSI Gaming ont su prouver leur qualité lors des tournois les plus importants et ont parfaitement répondu aux exigences des gamers pros.

Dernièrement, nous avons également réalisé un travail considérable dans la mise en place d'une nouvelle gamme dédiée aux créateurs de contenus sur Internet, acteurs principaux sur la scène de l'influence sur le web, aux vidéastes, photographes, beatmakers et bien d'autres professionnels. en proposant la gamme Prestige.

De plus, avec les Workstations, MSI propose  une gamme complète de Notebooks et Desktops ultra puissants équipés de GPU Quadro dernière Génération et certifiés Adobe Autodesk, Solidworks correspondants ainsi aux professionnels les plus exigeants.

Name: MBX Systems | Now Part of AHEAD
Description:
MBX is now a part of AHEAD. Our team engineers and integrates advanced hardware solutions for technology developers and cloud/edge infrastructure implementations, managing the entire hardware supply chain - from procurement through global logistics and supply chain orchestration. 

As AHEAD Engineered Solutions, we infuse advanced engineering capabilities into the broader AHEAD portfolio and offer supply chain orchestration and IT product lifecycle management through our proprietary Hatch software.

Name: IEI Integration Corp.
Description:
IEI Integration Corp. builds up the business as a leading industrial computer provider, and turns to artificial intelligence and networking edge computing. IEI's products are applied in computer-based applications such as factory automation, computer telephony integration, networking appliances, security, systems, and in fields like AI, IoT (Internet of Things), national defense, police administration, transportation, communication base stations and medical instruments. IEI continues to promote its brand products as well as serving ODM vertical markets to offer complete and professional services.
 
IEI is alliance with Intel, Microsoft, Amazon to offer a complete intelligent system with various options, including kinds of hardware devices, different operating systems, multiple applications, private/hybrid/public cloud computing, and data storage and security for developing integrated solutions, collaborating new applications, and expanding the markets.
 
IEI strives to achieve the ultimate aim of IoT and AI, and to create comfortable and convenient living spaces for human beings by using advanced technologies.

Name: Enclustra
Description: Enclustra is a leading innovator in FPGA technology, shaping the future of high-performance embedded solutions. Headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, with offices in Germany, the USA, China and Singapore—alongside a global network of subsidiaries—the company is fast-growing and dynamic, redefining FPGA design. Its cutting-edge portfolio includes FPGA-based electronic modules and FPGA-optimized IP solutions, delivering unparalleled performance and efficiency to industrial customers and R&D organizations. In addition to its products, Enclustra provides world-class engineering services covering the entire FPGA system development lifecycle, from high-speed hardware and HDL firmware to embedded software, system architecture, and rapid prototyping. By combining deep FPGA expertise with industry-specific insights, Enclustra enables customers to minimize development complexity, optimize performance, and accelerate time to market.

Name: Forecr.io
Description:
FORECR is a global provider of high-performance embedded and edge AI computing solutions, serving diverse industries such as smart cities, defense, robotics, industrial automation, transportation, railway and so on... With a strong focus on innovation, reliability, and customer success, FORECR delivers a comprehensive range of products engineered to meet the demands of the most challenging Edge AI and embedded computing applications.

As an NVIDIA Elite Partner, FORECR offers a robust portfolio of carrier boards, industrial box PCs, and ruggedized AI computers, all built on the Jetson platform and optimized for performance in harsh environments. Our in-house engineering expertise enables rapid customization, ensuring each solution is tailored to meet specific project requirements — from prototype to full-scale deployment.

Whether you choose from our off-the-shelf products or require a custom-engineered design, FORECR ensures a seamless transition from development to deployment, empowering organizations to accelerate innovation at the edge.

Name: Haply Robotics
Description:
At Haply Robotics, we strive to build amazing things.

We are a team devoted to the vision of a future where the lines are blurred between the physical and virtual world. 

We are a group of people that live to create new technologies with a lasting impact. We share a collective dedication to our work, not as an obligation, but as an opportunity. If you feel this way, you are amongst friends.

Our team of engineers and developers at Haply have product design and development in their DNA. We are a group of passionate makers with academic backgrounds in the areas of simulation, robotics, electronics, game dev, and mechanical design. Our specialty lies in the development of emerging technologies, taking things from concept to product through lightning-fast design iterations using state-of-the-art rapid manufacturing principles.

We engineer products grounded in solid physics and engineering principles, with quality at their core.

We are building the next generation of touch enabled interfaces in collaboration with leading gaming companies and research organizations from around the world. These physical consoles will combine force-feedback technologies with submillimeter precision wireless tracking in large environments and VR/AR displays.

Our goal is to forever shape the way we interact with our technology by facilitating the sense of touch to be a part of digital interactions. We envision a world where medical specialists from around the globe can access and train their physical skills with online learning material from leading institutions. In this world, students in a classroom setting will go on virtual reality field trips where they will brush away the dirt and pick through the rock to uncover virtual dinosaur bones. We will shape the way people learn, train, and entertain themselves from those at the peak of their careers to those at the very start.

Name: Reviver
Description: Reviver is a technology company and developer of the first-of-its-kind digital license plate platform. We are on a mission to modernize the driving experience. Our team is transforming the license plate into a platform for connected vehicles through the RPlate, the first digital license plate, enables mobile registration renewal, personalization, location and safety features, and more. The RPlate is now DMV-approved for use on consumer and commercial vehicles.

Name: NEXCOM International
Description: NEXCOM, founded in 1992 and headquartered in Taiwan, stands as a distinguished global leader in edge computing and industrial IoT solutions. Demonstrating an unwavering commitment to excellence, NEXCOM provides integrated services encompassing SD-Edge Computing (software-defined edge computing) and cutting-edge MOM (manufacturing operations management) platforms. Its comprehensive solutions include network and communication, mobile computing, video surveillance, smart city and retail, digital healthcare, AIoT services, OT cybersecurity, industrial IoT and robots—all developed based on open standards. NEXCOM continues to build up the AIoT eco-system toward ESG transformation, meeting the diverse services of its global clientele with innovation and sustainability.

Name: iKey, LTD
Description:
iKey, formerly Texas Industrial Peripherals, is the leader in sealed, rugged keyboards, displays and pointing devices.  We began in 1989 with the goal of fulfilling the market need for rugged computer peripherals. YOUTUBE:  iKey Keyboards - Follow us!

Ideal for applications in the harshest conditions, iKey products meet NEMA 4, NEMA 4X and IP65 and IP68 specifications, making them resistant to dust, dirt, water and corrosive liquids. Our keyboards are compatible with all hospital-approved cleaning agents, and they are built to withstand an extreme temperature range. iKey can also customize rugged products to meet customers' specific needs.  Every product we make is customized to a customer industry or customer's specifications. Newest product:  BT-870-TP Dual Connectivity Rugged Keyboard -- USB and Bluetooth-enabled. Ideal for police vehicles and use with the Samsung DeX and Galaxy S8 phone.

Our keyboards can be found in police cars, manufacturing plants, on military personnel,  in airplanes, helicopters, EMS vehicles,  and often, as detachable rugged keyboards for tablets used in all kinds of harsh settings.. Name: BrainChip
Description: BrainChip is a global technology company that is producing a groundbreaking neuromorphic processor that brings artificial intelligence to the edge in a way that is beyond the capabilities of other products. The chip is high performance, small, ultra-low power and enables a wide array of edge capabilities that include on-chip training, learning and inference. The event-based neural network processor is inspired by the spiking nature of the human brain and is implemented in an industry standard digital process. By mimicking brain processing BrainChip has pioneered a processing architecture, called Akida, which is both scalable and flexible to address the requirements in edge devices. At the edge, sensor inputs are analyzed at the point of acquisition rather than through transmission via the cloud to a data center. Akida is designed to provide a complete ultra-low power and fast AI Edge Network for vision, audio, olfactory and smart transducer applications. The reduction in system latency provides faster response and a more power efficient system that can reduce the large carbon footprint of data centers.

Description:

Thanks to the experience gained with CUBIT Wireless Innovation Lab and University of Pisa, SID has developed a strong know-how in wireless technology standard integration and implementation and in wireless network topology design. The company has a strong knowledge of main microcontroller architectures and the main RF transceiver for RFID and wireless sensor network applications and has also developed sever desktop and mobile application interacting with its own designed products. Name: Alazar Technologies Inc.
Description:
Alazar Technologies Inc. (AlazarTech) was founded in 2003 with the goal of serving the test and measurement market, in general, and the embedded waveform digitizer (OEM) market segment, in particular, by providing highly differentiated, high performance instrumentation products at affordable prices.

AlazarTech is in the business of helping customers measure and analyze high frequency analog signals in real time.  As these signals are analog in nature, they are incomprehensible to computers.  We convert these analog signals into digital patterns that computers can understand and analyze.  Our unique Dual Port Memory architecture allows customer-written software applications to analyze and render this data in real time.

Main applications of AlazarTech products are in Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT), Fiber sensing, Microscopy and RF signal recording. Our customers are constantly conceiving novel applications for our products - something that makes life very exciting at the company.

PCI Express bus based data acquisition has been the mainstay of AlazarTech products.  With sustained data transfer rates of 6.8 GB/s ad sample rates up to 4 GS/s, customers can analyze and store signals that were unimaginable only a few years ago.

AlazarTech provides extensive and robust software support for its products, including C, C++, C#, MATLAB(R) and LabVIEW(R). Windows and Linux operating systems are supported.

The operating philosophy of AlazarTech is guided by the search for a perfect balance between customer delight, employee fulfillment and shareholder value.  Company has been profitable every year since its inception and has shown a CAGR of over 30% over the past few years.

AlazarTech offers a generous benefits plan to all its full time employees.

In Projekten können bis zu 10 Jahre Lieferverfügbarkeit erreicht werden. Eine weitere Besonderheit ist die Versorgung mit bereits abgekündigter Hardware in Projekten. 
Die Strategie des Unternehmens ist auf Langzeitpartnerschaft ausgelegt. Jedem Kunden stellt compmall einen Projektmanager als persönlichen technischen Ansprechpartner zur Seite. Die Möglichkeit Kompatibilitätstests und Burn-In-Tests durchzuführen sowie der Support im eigenen Haus schaffen optimale Bedingungen, um Prototypen zu erstellen und die Ergebnisse in die Serie einfließen zu lassen. Die Produktion der individuellen Industrie-PC-Systeme wird ebenfalls im eigenen Haus umgesetzt. Dadurch kann der Projektmanager den gesamten Produktions-, Liefer- und Supportprozess vor Ort steuern.
Das Produktportfolio besteht aus:
•	Slot-CPUs & Backplanes, Embedded Boards
•	Embedded PCs, Hutschienen-/DIN-Rail-PCs, 19 Zoll- und Wallmount-Systeme
•	LCD-Panel-PC, Touchscreen-Monitoren und Displays
•	In-Vehicle-Lösungen und Medical-PC-Systeme
Das Dienstleistungskonzept beinhaltet insbesondere:

Name: AAEON Industrial PC
Description:
AAEON was established in 1992. AAEON developed and focused on Single Board Computers. In 1994, AAEON set up Research & Design Department. Also, the production lines were completely converted to Compact Boards, Half-Size CPU cards and Full-Size CPU cards. At the same year, AAEON obtained ISO-9001 and aimed to be an OEM/ODM manufacturer specialist.
 
The number of AAEON employees exceeded 100 in 1996, and USA branch office was founded in New Jersey. Two years later, China branch and Europe sales offices were also established. AAEON's global network was thus set up to service customers around the world.
 
The year of 1999 was a landmark for AAEON. High-speed SMT lines replaced old SMT machines to increase the productivity. Also, AAEON, the first in Taiwan's IPC industry, went public and was listed on the OTC (Over The Counter). In the same year, AAEON Foundation was established to support the efforts in technology education.
 
In 2000, AAEON acquired Astech Inc., a leading Panel PC manufacturer. With this merger, AAEON extended its product offering to Industrial Workstations, Panel PCs, Display Monitors and LCD PCs. In the same year, AAEON received the Innovation Research Award, which distinguished AAEON as a strong engineering company with solid R & D capacities.

Además contamos con un servicio técnico especializado para lograr la mejor experiencia de los productos que comercializamos. Llevamos más de 25 años acompañando a las empresas de Cuyo.
Somos una empresa familiar mendocina, iniciamos nuestro trabajo el 13 de mayo de 1994, con el propósito de ofrecer un buen servicio al usuario de computadoras, garantizando responsabilidad, seriedad y eficiencia. La experiencia de estos 25 años nos ha permitido conocer a fondo las necesidades de nuestra comunidad de clientes. Con el avance tecnológico hemos incorporando nuevos productos y servicios que brinden soluciones a comercios especializados en rubros como: calzado, indumentaria, accesorios, marroquinería, blanco y regalería.
En julio de 2017 fuimos una de las 6 primeras empresas de Mendoza en obtener el Sello de Comercio Responsable de la Subsecretaría de Industria y Comercio, Ministerio de Economía, Gobierno de Mendoza (IDC). Este 2019 estamos cumpliendo 25 años de trayectoria y buscamos celebrarlo acompañando a los comercios a tener una empresa organizada y eficiente. The PC Builder India started with a simple yet powerful idea:

But don’t mistake our fun tone for lack of seriousness—we’re experts at what we do. From choosing the perfect processor to balancing aesthetics with airflow, we sweat the small stuff so you don’t have to.
With an ever-growing range of custom PCs, pre-built setups, components, and laptop upgrade services, we’re your one-stop solution for everything tech. And we’re just getting started! Whether you’re in Delhi or beyond, our mission is to make high-performance computing accessible, personalized, and downright awesome.
Join us on this journey and experience the thrill of a PC built just for you. At The PC Builder India, we don’t just build PCs; we build trust, excitement, and a whole lot of awesomeness.

АСБК является частью международного холдинга ASBISc Enterprises Plc., который является крупнейшим дистрибьютором IT-продуктов в Европе, на Ближнем Востоке и в Африке. Всё это – в одном месте и на расстоянии одного звонка.

Наша компания работает на рынке IT-продуктов с 1996 года и репутация для нас дороже любых доходов. Мы смело берём и исполняем обязательства по поставкам, осуществляем гарантийный ремонт и предоставляем подменный фонд. Мы всегда настроены на длительные партнёрские отношения и не верим в «одноразовые» сделки.

В нашей компании работают сторонники открытого бизнеса и ярые противники бюрократии. Мы решаем вопросы, согласовываем документы, принимаем решения не за недели, а за часы. Мы с удовольствием приедем к Вам в офис с презентацией, покажем новый продукт, продемонстрируем его особенности и интегрируем его в вашу инфраструктуру.

Name: IT-Remarketing
Description:
Seit Menschengedenken gehören Abfälle zu unserem Alltag. Durch die heutigen sozialen und materiellen Lebensbedingungen sowie durch technischen und wissenschaftlichen Fortschritt entstehen in Europa immer größere Mengen an Abfällen im Pro-Kopf-Durchschnitt.

Führende Industrieunternehmen entwickeln immer neue und bessere Produkte, um sich an einem oftmals schwer umkämpften Markt behaupten zu können. Trotz innovativer Produktweiter- und -neuentwicklungen verkürzen sich die Regelnutzungszeiten und Produktlebenszyklen laufend. Die Folge ist eine bedrohliche Expansion von entsorgungsbedürftigen Abfällen, insbesondere im Bereich der Elektro- und Elektronikaltgeräte.

Die Besitzer von IT-Altgeräten möchten sich dieser oftmals schnell und kostengünstig entledigen. Dabei wird häufig verkannt, dass Elektro- und Elektronikaltgeräte und darin enthaltene Rohstoffe durchaus wirtschaftliche Bedeutung haben. 

Zur Schonung der Umwelt und der natürlichen Ressourcen entwickelte der europäische Gesetzgeber zahlreiche Richtlinien und Verordnungen, die im nationalen Recht der Mitgliedsstaaten bereits umgesetzt wurden und zu beachten sind. Oberstes Ziel der Gesetzgebung war in der Vergangenheit das Recycling von Produkten und deren Bestandteilen. Seit geraumer Zeit verlagerten sich die Ziele der Gesetzgebung jedoch dahingehend, dass nun die Vermeidung und Wiederverwendung von Abfällen im Vordergrund der entsprechenden Normen stehen.

Die Kernkompetenz von Notebook12 liegt – ganz im Sinne der gesetzlichen Vorschriften – in der Aufbereitung zur Wiederverwendung von IT-Altgeräten. Unser Unternehmen auditiert, testet, repariert und löscht ausgemusterte Informationstechnologie-Produkte sowie Elektro- und Elektronikaltgeräte. Wir haben in den letzten fünf Jahren über zwei Millionen wiederverwendbare Assets in die Kreislaufwirtschaft zurückgeführt. Damit gehören wir europaweit zu den erfolgreichsten Unternehmen im Bereich IT-Remarketing.

Our solutions support a variety of standards, including PCI Express (PCIe), Non-Volatile Memory Express (NVMe), Serial Attached SCSI (SAS), and Serial ATA (SATA).

Name: QPAD Pro Gaming Gear
Description:
QPAD built its success on a grass root commitment to the gaming community. We thrive in the madness of competition and embrace the free spirit of gaming. QPAD provide the gaming world with premium high-quality equipment, giving eSporters, enthusiasts and casual gamers all over the world a winning edge.

In an industry dominated by gigantic multi-national corporations, QPAD is a breath of fresh air. The story of QPAD started in Stockholm, Sweden, back in 1992 when computer enthusiast and first generation hardcore gamer Christer Körnbäck founded the company. The idea Christer had was to produce high-quality mouse pads with custom print. Back in those days, gamers had no choice but to use standard ball mouse and standard office grade mouse pads.

In 1997, one of the World’s first eSport events was held in Stockholm; The Swedish Quake Championships. Christer, was asked to produce a custom-sized mouse pad, considerably larger than the models available at the time. This was the birth of the first piece of premium eSport equipment designed with only gaming in mind. The mouse pad was the core of the QPAD product line for years, as the small one-man-business grew in both size and fame, earning respect amongst eSport athletes, gamers and computer enthusiasts all over the world.

Now QPAD has widened the product line to also include award-winning gaming-grade mice, headsets and keyboards. These include the World’s first mechanical gaming keyboard offering full NKRO through usb only, QPAD MK-85 and the first laser gaming mouse actually usable for professional gaming purposes QPAD 5K. With the launch of the QPAD QH-1339 Professional Gaming Headset the company further consolidated its place as a leading provider of premium gaming gear. The 1339 headset is by many gamers considered the best gaming headset on the market today.

All of the products in the QPAD family carry the same legacy: Passion for gaming and a true commitment to the gaming and eSport community.

Name: Electronics Consultants
Description:
I am an electrical engineer with over 30 years of experience in the electronics industry. As an independent consultant since 1984, I have served a diverse clientele having equally diverse needs. I have worked for large corporations, small companies, startup companies, and individual entrepreneurs. I have managed projects, studied product and system feasibility, assessed technology, advised executive management, mentored young engineers, and provided litigation support to attorneys and their clients. I have developed products, systems, and devices for industrial, consumer, commercial, military, and medical applications. I have performed research and development in corporate and academic laboratories, and worked with testing, sustaining engineering, and manufacturing organizations. I have also taught graduate and undergraduate courses in electronics, computer networks, and control theory.
My consulting practice comprises not only me, but also the hardware, software, mechanical, and optical engineers and scientists I subcontract. It includes the printed circuit board designers, PCB assembly houses, technicians, technical writers, machinists, vendors, manufacturers, and distributors who contribute their special skills to my successfully completed projects.

Name: CTC ITSolutions (now Circular IT group)
Description:
The Leading European Brand in Making IT Circular.

At Circular IT group, we help organizations unlock the residual value of their IT hardware, always in a safe, secure, and compliant way.

Through our advanced ITAD solutions, we ensure a fully transparent and certified process: we safely collect and erase your end-of-life IT equipment, giving it the opportunity for a second life.

Our customers and partners stay in full control, whether the recovered value is used for resale, donation, or refund. And when reuse is no longer an option, we guarantee sustainable recycling with minimal environmental impact. Most importantly, your IT assets get maximum return at full control and all supported by the highest degree of certification.

We also support your circular ambitions with additional services:
•	Refurbishment & Repair
•	Re-commerce
•	Device as a Service & IT Rentals

Every day, we work to reduce e-waste, limit the use of critical raw materials, and lower CO₂ emissions, while promoting digital inclusion and protecting biodiversity.

We make IT circular!

In the late 1970's DANBIT produced computer systems which were used for the calculation of recipes for ready-mixed concrete and control of the actual weighing.

DANBIT was among the first companies to import hardware from Taiwan. We started with importing computer equipment, which we rebuilt into telephones for hearing-impaired customers.
Through this entire time DANBIT has maintained its strategy with technical expertise as the most important factor. In recent years, our activities has shifted to sales of special PC-oriented products for industrial application.
DANBIT is main supplier of more than 4000 special PC - oriented products. DANBIT imports products from companies in USA, Germany, Netherlands and England.

Name: E-MU Systems
Description:
E-MU Systems is a leading developer of digital audio products to serve musicians and audio professionals. Superb audio-quality and consistent technical innovation have made our products the choice for quality-minded musicians worldwide.

Founded in 1971 by Dave Rossum and Scott Wedge, E-MU Systems built its reputation in the 1970's by building modular analog synthesizers and selling them to some of the biggest artists of the day like Frank Zappa and Tangerine Dream, as well as licensing technologies to companies like Oberheim and Sequential Circuits.  In 1981 E-MU introduced the original Emulator, offering musicians the first affordable digital sampler.  The ‘80's saw development of E-MU's line of legendary drum machines, most notably the classic SP-1200 drum machine which has become synonymous with Hip-Hop music. In 1989 E-MU released Proteus, the world's first sound module, and genre-specific modules like Planet Phatt and Orbit, still found in countless studios around the world.

E-MU Systems is based in Scotts Valley, California, United States about 50 miles south of San Francisco on the outskirts of Silicon Valley. E-MU Systems has a world-wide presence with a European office, and a Pacific Rim office located in Singapore. The company is a wholly owned subsidiary of Creative Technology Ltd. of Singapore, created as a result of an acquisition in March 1993 of E-MU Systems.

Name: W3E | Circulaire ICT-Oplossingen
Description:
Bij W3E zijn we gespecialiseerd in het in- en verkopen en verwerken van gebruikte en overtollige hardware en andere ICT-gerelateerde apparatuur. Ons team van deskundige professionals streeft ernaar maatwerkoplossingen te bieden die aan specifieke behoeften voldoen. Onze focus ligt op hoogwaardige dienstverlening die organisaties ondersteunt bij Maatschappelijk Verantwoord Ondernemen (MVO).

De kernwaarden van W3E
•	Reduceren van elektronisch afval
•	Behoud van kostbare natuurlijke hulpbronnen
•	Vermindering van de CO2-uitstoot
•	Bijdragen aan een circulaire economie
•	Behoud planeet voor toekomstige generaties
•	Bevordering hergebruik

Onze Missie
W3E heeft als missie duurzaamheid te bevorderen door e-waste te verminderen, natuurlijke hulpbronnen te behouden en bij te dragen aan een circulaire economie. Onze diensten strekken zich uit van het verminderen van CO2-uitstoot tot het voorkomen van datalekken door datavernietiging. Samen streven we naar een positieve invloed op de samenleving.

Onze Visie

Maatschappelijk Verantwoord Ondernemen (MVO)
Bij W3E is MVO geen verplichting, maar een passie en uitdaging. We dragen bij aan het reduceren van CO2-uitstoot en roepen op samen te werken aan een duurzame toekomst.

Certificering en Betrouwbaarheid
W3E is volledig gecertificeerd. 'Afspraak is afspraak' is ons principe, wat u gemoedsrust geeft met een partner die alle diensten onder één dak heeft.

Name: Control Data Corporation
Description: Control Data Corporation (CDC) was a mainframe and supercomputer firm. CDC was one of the nine major United States computer companies through most of the 1960s; the others were IBM, Burroughs Corporation, DEC, NCR, General Electric, Honeywell, RCA, and UNIVAC. CDC was well-known and highly regarded throughout the industry at the time. For most of the 1960s, Seymour Cray worked at CDC and developed a series of machines that were the fastest computers in the world by far, until Cray left the company to found Cray Research (CRI) in the 1970s. After several years of losses in the early 1980s, in 1988 CDC started to leave the computer manufacturing business and sell the related parts of the company, a process that was completed in 1992 with the creation of Control Data Systems, Inc. The remaining businesses of CDC currently operate as Ceridian. (Source: Wikipedia.)

Name: Atessa, Inc.
Description:
Atessa, Inc., provides Trusted IP with anti-tamper (AT) technology.  Our products and services enable system developers to meet AT requirements and address global supply chain security challenges.

The proliferation of electronic systems – and the world’s dependence on them to process and store critical information – has enticed the onset of millions of attacks, both in the defense and commercial worlds.  By inserting AT technology, system developers can ensure the protection of their vital data and the long-term viability of their system.  

Whether a military-grade weapons platform, communications device or financial data storage system, integrating AT technology from Atessa will deter exploitation of these critical systems and prevent reverse engineering that would allow adversaries to garner data, transfer information, alter system capabilities, or develop countermeasures.  In addition, inserting our solutions will ensure the security of systems throughout the global supply chain.

Atessa is a Department of Defense (DoD) Category 1A Trusted Integrated Circuit Supplier for Design Services, accredited by the Defense Microelectronics Activity (DMEA).

Name: Kyocera (KCR Printing SA-Greece)
Description:
KYOCERA Document Solutions σημειώνει την προέλευσή της το 1934, με την κατασκευή και πώληση των blue-line printing machines, η οποία μετεξελίχθηκε το 1948 σε ανώνυμη εταιρεία την  KYOCERA Industrial Co., Ltd. Με την πάροδο του χρόνου, η εταιρεία αναπτύσσει εμπορική δραστηριότητα στην Ευρώπη και τις Ηνωμένες Πολιτείες, και φτάνοντας στο 2000 όπου εξαγόρασε τον όμιλο MITA Corporation. Το 2002, συγχωνεύτηκε με την επιχείρηση εκτυπωτών της KYOCERA - MITA Corporation και από τότε έχει συνδυαστεί η τεχνολογία των laser εκτυπωτών και από τις δύο εταιρείες, για να μας γοητεύσουν με τα καινοτόμα και φιλικά προς το περιβάλλον προϊόντα τους. Τέλος, τo 2012 η εταιρεία μετονομάστηκε σε KYOCERA Document Solutions Inc.

Η KYOCERA χρησιμοποιώντας «κεραμικά υλικά», ως τα βασικά συστατικά των προϊόντων της, συνιστά κορυφαίο κατασκευαστή εκτυπωτικών μηχανημάτων, όπου περιλαμβάνει στο product portfolio της, τόσο έγχρωμους όσο και μονόχρωμους εκτυπωτές, αντιγραφικά και πολυμηχανήματα. Για περισσότερα από 20 χρόνια, τα προϊόντα της Kyocera χαρακτηρίζονται από μεγάλης διάρκειας μέρη, γεγονός που προσδίδουν μεγαλύτερη αξιοπιστία κατά τη διάρκεια ζωής του προϊόντος.

Η πλήρης γκάμα του εκτυπωτικού εξοπλισμού, σε συνδυασμό με την προηγμένη τεχνολογία λογισμικού, μας επιτρέπουν να προσφέρουμε στους πελάτες λύσεις εγγράφων, για την υποστήριξη των επιχειρήσεων τους.
Από το 2017, ο όμιλος της Active Computer Systems AE αντιπροσωπεύει επίσημα τα προϊόντα και τις λύσεις της Kyocera στην Ελληνική αγορά.

Name: Laptop Doctors Nairobi
Description:
We are specialists in laptop repairs and laptop screen repairs for both trade, corporate and the general public in Nairobi.
At Laptop Doctors Nairobi we provide Laptop repairs for home users and business IT services at affordable prices. We cover most of the Nairobi areas and visit home or office at your convenient date and time.

At Laptop Doctors Nairobi we repair all makes of laptop. We specialise in repairing laptop motherboard faults that most other repairers reject. Motherboard faults are especially difficult to repair as a lot of 'hands on' experience is needed before a motherboard can be repaired economically.

We do NOT repair all laptops at a fixed price as others claim to do as every repair is different to the next. Imagine taking your car to a garage that offered a fixed repair cost for every fault; they would only do the simple cheap faults and not do the expensive complex faults. Laptop Doctors Nairobi will attempt every repair and give you a fair price for every repair. Once we give you a price, we will keep to it; if for any reason we cannot complete the repair then we will make NO CHARGE at all.

Most repairs are completed in 24-48hrs but this does depend on component availability. We can complete many repairs the same day. Please telephone us first if you require a same day repair, so we can let you know if it is possible and to arrange a time. 

We offer free quotations for any laptop repair work.

info@laptopdoctors.co.ke

Description:
MIXconcept, société de services informatiques basée à Chatillon d’Azergues (69) spécialisée dans l’assistance utilisateurs.

MIXconcept joue aujourd’hui le rôle de « guichet unique » pour ses clients. C’est à dire que les équipes de MIXconcept sont capables des vous accompagner de la genèse de votre projet jusqu’à sa mise en œuvre puis d’assister vos utilisateurs au quotidien.

Notre approche :
Nous commençons souvent par un audit de vos installations afin de vous proposer des solutions matérielles et logicielles conformes à vos exigences métier et tenant compte du parc existant. 

Notre objectif est de dresser un diagnostic complet et pluridisciplinaire de votre système d’information : le matériel bien sûr, mais aussi les solutions logicielles, la qualité des réseaux, les mesures de sécurité, la définition des profils utilisateurs et des droits d’accès associés, la gestion des licences …

Une fois les préconisations mises en œuvre, MIXconcept tient un rôle de partenaire privilégié et devient votre interlocuteur informatique unique : fini les parties de ping-pong avec vos différents partenaires !

Mais surtout, MIXconcept c'est de l'assistance utilisateurs au quotidien de 8h00 à 19h00 du lundi au vendredi : Allo je n’arrive pas à imprimer ?  Allo, je ne reçois plus mes mails ? Allo, je n’arrive pas à rejoindre une réunion Teams ? Allo, je ne trouve plus mes fichiers dans mon OneDrive ? … 
Vous serez pris en charge par des techniciens capables d'intervenir au téléphone via nos outils de prise en main à distance et même directement sur site.

Chez MIXconcept  nous sommes des urgentistes de l’informatique !

Téléphonez au 04.37.43.05.51 et cliquez sur le raccourci que nous aurons installé sur votre bureau – C’est bon nos techniciens ont la main et vous écoutent !

Si vous avez lu jusque-là et que vous avez un problème informatique appelez le numéro unique juste au-dessus et si vous avez un projet appelez aussi le numéro unique et demandez Didier LIETS.

Name: ARM Cortex-M Book
Description: The book introduces basic programming of ARM Cortex-M cores in assembly and C at the register level, and the fundamentals of embedded system design. It presents basic concepts such as data representations (integer, fixed-point, floating-point), assembly instructions, stack, and implementing basic controls and functions of C language at the assembly level. It covers advanced topics such as interrupts, mixing C and assembly, direct memory access (DMA), system timers (SysTick), multi-tasking, SIMD instructions for digital signal processing (DSP), and instruction encoding/decoding. The book also gives detailed examples of interfacing peripherals, such as general purpose I/O (GPIO), LCD driver, keypad interaction, stepper motor control, PWM output, timer input capture, DAC, ADC, real-time clock (RTC), and serial communication (USART, I2C, SPI, and USB).

MacOutfitters has closed for business as of October, 2013.

Our goal was to bring to the Pittsburgh region the level of expertise, service, and passion for Apple products and outstanding customer service for which MacOutfitters had become known. In March 2010 we relocated to a larger store in order to better serve our expanding client base.

A Set of Online Tools.  Build your first project in minutes, and easily build projects that talk to the Web. Control your project from a Web page. Focus on your idea, not all that other stuff.  Hardware + software = easy

An API.  A Software Developer’s Dream, with a URL for every Pinoccio board. REST Endpoints, Webhooks, and Websockets make bridging hardware to the Web super easy.

A Community.  Be a Part of It.  Makers, artists, engineers, teachers, students. Help us shape what Pinoccio will be, and we'll build the future together.

Hardware e fornitori certificati;

Configurazioni standardizzate e testate nei nostri laboratori;

Servizi di monitoraggio proattivo, aggiornamenti pianificati e assistenza diretta.

Ogni sistema Miniserver nasce per essere semplice da installare, stabile nel tempo e pronto all’evoluzione tecnologica.
Dalla virtualizzazione alla protezione dei dati, fino al Disaster Recovery multi-sito, costruiamo infrastrutture robuste che mettono al centro l’affidabilità e la sicurezza.

Description:
SynSense is a leading-edge neuromorphic computing company. It provides dedicated mixed-signal/fully digital neuromorphic processors which overcome the limitations of legacy von Neumann computers to provide an unprecedented combination of ultra-low power consumption and low-latency performance. SynSense was founded in March 2017 based on advances in neuromorphic computing hardware developed at the Institute of Neuroinformatics of the University of Zurich and ETH Zurich. SynSense is developing “full-stack” custom neuromorphic processors for a variety of artificial-intelligence (AI) edge-computing applications that require ultra-low-power and ultra-low-latency features, including autonomous robots, always-on co-processors for mobile and embedded devices, wearable health-care systems, security, IoT applications, and computing at the network edge.

The SynSense Group also includes iniVation, the original and leading provider of technology and solutions for high-performance neuromorphic vision.

Name: Electro Computer Warehouse - Electro Inc.
Description:
Electro Computer Warehouse is a supplier of used and refurbished computer equipment. In 1994 we started our business under the name of Electro world and after our relocation to Canada in 2004 our legal name was changed to Electro Inc and our trading name is Electro Computer Warehouse. Our corporate office and main distribution warehouse is located in Mississauga, Canada. We also have satellite distribution centers in USA, Dubai, Pakistan and Tanzania.

Electro Computer Warehouse ranks among the largest wholesaler and remarketer of pre-owned lease computer equipment with a market presence in North America, Africa, Asia and Middle East. The company is strategically located to serve its customers and our success is dependent on our people and their commitment to fully understand our customer requirements and expectations. Our goal is to always deliver on our customers' expectations and our strength lies in the strategic partnership with manufacturers, off lease Asset Management companies and our long term customer relationships.

We are not a "Broker" and the inventory offered to our clients is physically in our warehouse and we welcome our customers to inspect the products on-site before delivery. Our record keeping, quality controls and process are thorough and this facilitates audit inspections required by developing countries. We will coordinate audit requirements and engage the services of international audit firms including SGS to provide such verification.

Electro Computer Warehouse also refurbishes and supports recycling of equipment so that used electronic equipment is disposed in an environmentally friendly manner. This goal is a win: win for the manufacturer, Asset Management Company and the customer. We provide an opportunity for our customers to buy a single unit, bulk lots, partial containers lots and full containers at competitive pricing. We look forward to your enquiry and on building a long term mutually beneficial relationship.

Name: Epoka
Description:
Epoka has over 30 years of experience refurbishing and distributing end-of-life IT equipment. We specialize in servers, storage systems, and networking hardware. We support our customers in maintaining independence from manufacturers. 

When a product reaches end-of-life status, it is neither sold nor supported by the manufacturer. In our experience, products are still in perfect working condition - long after they have been officially retired. We believe that YOU should be able to decide, when you want to upgrade – it is not always viable to upgrade a system with something newer. With our support, you can keep using your systems invariably whilst avoiding a costly investment.

We offer more than 10.000 unique products and have around 100.000 units in our warehouse, ready for shipping. We carry all major brands, i.e. Cisco, Dell, EMC, IBM, NetApp & HDS, to mention a few. Most of our products are refurbished, and some products are available in new/open box/unused condition. We do the refurbishment in-house: our experienced technicians have the knowledge and the necessary setup to carefully inspect and test every product, filtering out faulty or non-working equipment. 

Epoka offers various services, too. Our technicians can customize orders easily – from simple configurations to tailor-made storage solutions. We can build you a server configuration that matches your needs, and all you have to do is turn it on. It is also possible to get spare part kits and even have a local customized stock holding near your location.

We aim to be the world’s leading, value-added, multi-brand distributor of refurbished enterprise servers, storage systems, and networking equipment. 

As our customer, you can be sure that you get quality and original products, excellent service, and all the help you need to extend the life of your end-of-life equipment.

Exxact Corporation is a leading global provider of advanced computing solutions, empowering organizations to accelerate innovation and accomplish their goals. Specializing in system integration, contract manufacturing, and IT distribution, we deliver cutting-edge platforms tailored for deep learning, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and high performance computing (HPC).

Our expertise spans a wide array of industries and applications, including life sciences, molecular dynamics, engineering simulation, computer vision, big data analytics, and natural language processing (NLP). At our ISO 9001:2015-certified facility, Exxact leverages the latest GPU technologies and frameworks to design, engineer, and build turnkey workstations, servers, clusters, and storage solutions optimized for the most demanding workloads. From initial consultation and solution validation to manufacturing, deployment, and ongoing support, our end-to-end services ensure seamless integration and maximum performance. 

With a customer-centric approach and partnerships with industry leaders like NVIDIA, AMD, and more, Exxact supports over 3,000 clients worldwide and is recognized as NVIDIA Partner Network Solution Integration Partner of the Year for two consecutive years. Exxact also offers standalone comprehensive suite of services—including smart hands support, integration and infrastructure, logistics and supply chain management, and rack integration—that enable clients to deploy, scale, and optimize their IT environments with confidence. Whether you’re advancing breakthroughs in life sciences, deploying large-scale HPC clusters, or harnessing AI for business transformation, Exxact is your trusted partner for next-generation computing solutions.

Erweitert wird das Produktportfolio um Robotersysteme für Montage und Handhabung. Die Epson Deutschland GmbH wurde 1979 als Tochter der japanischen SEIKO EPSON CORPORATION gegründet. cab is Europe’s biggest manufacturer of label printing systems. The range of devices includes solutions for marking individual components, units, products or packaging. Employees at locations in eight countries and more than 800 distribution and service partners around the globe are there to meet the targets.

Products need labeling
In the automotive sector, labeling ensures that components to the smallest screw are traceable. In logistics, labeling guarantees scheduled delivery. On electrical devices, typeplates refer to performance data and use. The pharmaceutical industry sees labeling prevent from errors relevant to health. In chemistry, labeling points out to risks associated  with the handling of the products – multi-colored and without any barriers as regards language. On food, labeling informs about ingredients and on textiles about its best possible care.

Made in Germany
cab since more than 50 years develops and manufactures solutions for product marking and a large amount of accessories for any demand. The product range includes label printers, print and apply systems, label dispensers and marking laser systems. In addition, cab provides labels and thermal transfer ribbons for the perfect imprint.

Shaping innovation together
As an owner-operated family company, cab offers customer focus and economic continuity. Foresight, ideas, added by curiosity and joy in its own products and their further development have always been driving forces in the company.

Consistent know-how, high level of vertical integration 
All mechanical and plastic components used in the devices are manufactured at the Sömmerda site near Erfurt. Substantial production methods provide the precondition to manufacture complex marking systems economically.

Name: Free Geek
Description:
Free Geek’s mission is to sustainably reuse technology, enable digital access, and provide education to create a community that empowers people to realize their potential.

--

Technology is rapidly changing. Computers, monitors, printers, and other electronics are all being replaced every few years. The resulting electronic waste — referred to as e-waste — is the fastest growing toxic waste stream in the United States. According to the EPA, roughly 2.4 million tons of e-waste are created each year.

Free Geek is where retired electronic devices can find new life. Free Geek staff and volunteers work hard to refurbish the electronics we receive. We maintain strict data security standards when processing any data-bearing devices that pass through our facility. By choosing us as your e-cycler, your electronics will be properly disposed, or given back to the community through our digital inclusion programs.

Name: DIGIBURO SAS
Description:
DIGIBURO SAS : Pionniers de l’éco-impression et du digital en Bretagne

 Notre Mission :
Fournir des solutions innovantes qui combinent efficacité numérique et respect de notre planète.

 Éco-Impression avec Aquaprint :
Technologie révolutionnaire qui transforme le monde de l’impression. Contrairement aux méthodes traditionnelles utilisant du toner, Aquaprint utilise de l’eau. 

	•	RESPECT de l’Environnement : Aquaprint élimine les émissions de particules fines et réduit considérablement la consommation d’énergie.
	•	ELIMINATION des Déchets : La technologie Aquaprint n'utilise pas de consommables ou de pièces techniques obligatoires habituellement rencontrés dans les imprimantes toner.
	•	QUALITE d’Impression Supérieure : Grâce à la finesse de l’application des pigments, les impressions Aquaprint offrent une meilleure précision des détails.
	•	ECONOMIE : En réduisant fortement la consommation d’énergie, Aquaprint permet des économies significatives sur le long terme.

 Solutions Digitales :
Nous offrons une gamme complète de services digitaux, allant des écrans interactifs à la gestion documentaire.

 Innovation et Expertise :
Nous sommes constamment à la recherche de nouvelles technologies pour offrir des solutions à la fois innovantes et durables.

 Engagement RSE :
La responsabilité sociale et environnementale est au cœur de notre démarche.

 Suivez-nous :
Ne manquez pas nos dernières actualités et innovations !

Name: Computer Lab International
Description:
Computer Lab International, Inc. (CLI) 
An innovative leader in thin computing-based software and hardware who delivers solutions that enable Green IT, cloud computing and virtualization.  A trusted advisor to our clients, CLI along with our strategic partner network, including; Citrix, Microsoft, and VMware, deliver scalable, integrated and cost-effective IT solutions and services.

Based in Southern California, CLI carries over 20 years of terminal and thin computing expertise and offers a full array of thin client devices and turnkey management software.

CLI thin clients enable simple, reliable, and secure access to applications running on Microsoft Windows Terminal Services, Citrix Application Delivery Infrastructure, and VMware desktop virtualization as well as multimedia, Java, and the Internet. Most models have a built-in terminal emulator to access midrange, mainframe, UNIX, and other legacy applications.

"Device Customization" is where CLI has a long established history. Providing customers with an integrated solution to migrate from outdated IT infrastructure to cutting edge technology or assisting with adding to existing infrastructure.

Typical CLI customers are looking to:
Modernize, update, and renovate proven line of business (LOB) applications
Deliver new features and capabilities to users in public and private clouds
Reduce the risk of upgrading legacy systems to match today's compliance and regulations
Shorten the time-to-market for system enhancements buy what you need (not those additional bells and whistles)
Decrease IT Spend and Increase IT Return-On-Investment (ROI)

Customer satisfaction is CLI’s number one priority. CLI backs its quality products with unparalleled services and support.  From order processing to shipping, from technical support to quality control, from sales to marketing, every CLI employee is dedicated to consistently exceeding customer expectations.

Name: Haption
Description: A high-tech company based in France, HAPTION designs manufactures and sells haptic devices with professional quality, suited to the needs of its customers, both industrial and academic. Haptics is a new productivity tool for the industry. Using force-feedback, it is possible to simulate on the digital mock-up all operations needed for the new product, as early as the design stage, and without physical prototypes. Assembly/disassembly tasks, maintenance, and all-day use can be tested and rehearsed on a virtual prototype. Our products provide force-feedback on all 6 degrees-of-freedom (translations and rotations). Only 6-dof force-feedback enables realistic interaction between 3D objects.

Name: Z-Crossing Solutions Pvt Ltd

Product Engineering: We provide end-to-end embedded design services, encompassing system architecture, electronics design (analog and digital circuit design), software design (firmware development, Linux/RTOS-based programming), mechanical design, prototyping, and validation.

Engineering Services: We specialize in Automotive Electronics development,  industrial IoT, healthcare IoT, and agri-tech IoT services, including smart functionality for analog machinery, production process automation, remote asset management, remote patient monitoring, and smart sensors for agriculture. We have expertise in wireless communication protocols such as LoRaWAN, Zigbee, BLE, MQTT, and cloud-based platforms like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud for IoT deployments.

Embedded Software Development: Our skilled firmware engineers have expertise in microcontroller (MCU) brands such as ARM, AVR, PIC, STM32, and OS-based programming (Linux, RTOS). We have experience in GUI application development, bootloader development, firmware update over the air (FOTA), and IoT edge computing.

PCB Design Services: We offer custom PCB design services for complex multiprocessor systems, wireless devices, wearable devices, and high-speed interfaces/memory technologies. Our capabilities include footprint creation, controlled impedance design, high-density/Highly Constrained Designs, and compliance with industry standards such as IPC, RoHS, and UL.

Testing Services: We provide comprehensive hardware testing, firmware testing, integration testing, functional and system testing, and pre-compliance testing. 

Supply Chain Management Services: We offer end-to-end supply chain management services, including turnkey and discrete manufacturing, BOM analysis, component engineering, compliance management, obsolescence management, procurement support outsourcing, and product cost optimization.

Alta Tecnologia, longa experiência e garantia de qualidade em cada peça fabricada: é com isso que a REDRAGON rapidamente alcançou sucesso e a confiança em diversos países para te deixar cada vez mais #ReadyForBattle.

Name: OpenMV LLC
Description:
The OpenMV project is about creating low-cost, extensible, Python powered, machine vision modules and aims at becoming the “Arduino of Machine Vision“. Our goal is to bring machine vision algorithms closer to makers and hobbyists. We’ve done the difficult and time-consuming algorithm work for you leaving more time for your creativity!

The OpenMV Cam is like an super powerful Arduino with a camera on board that you program in Python. We make it easy to run machine visions algorithms on what the OpenMV Cam sees so you can track colors, detect faces, and more in seconds and then control I/O pins in the real-world.

Name: 仁宝电脑(重庆)有限公司
Description:
从1984年起，仁宝电脑便以专业的经营团队和坚强的研发实力，由电脑周边制造厂，发展成目前的规模。今天的仁宝已在笔记型电脑业界建立了领导地位，所生产的液晶视讯与智能型行动装置产品质量兼俱，更以稳健的步伐朝向5C ( Cloud, Connecting, Computing, Communication, Consumer.)的领域发展。为了架构全球运筹体系，仁宝在大陆、美国、越南、巴西、波兰及墨西哥相继成立据点，提供客户弹性及快速的服务，并成为一个国际知名的ODM厂商！
 
仁宝的企业总部位于台北市内湖区，这里是行政管理、业务、采购及财务会计的中心，同时也是仁宝的研发重镇。积极培养自主研发实力，掌握关键性技术，在完整迅速的沟通下，按部就班执行所有专案的开发，坚强的研发实力，一直是仁宝赢得客户信赖的主要因素，全球六千多名高素质科技人才凝聚的团队力量，加上全然投入的精神，使资讯科技更贴近人们需求。

仁宝以多年的专业经验，体认出产品竞争的主要关键在于品质、成本、服务及推出的速度，而针对不同的客户设置专属的研发小组，使仁宝无论在笔记型电脑、液晶电视、智能型行动装置及新开发的车用及数位消费电子产品方面，均能充分迎合市场快速的变迁，并在专利的申请与核准获得了丰硕的成果。从研发便展开的品管作业，在精密先进的仪器设备配合下，不断进行严格的测试检验，对卓越完美的坚持，使仁宝所推出的产品，呈现出别具一格的严谨细密，而由逐年上升的研发经费与工程人员，更充分说明仁宝对领先市场的坚持与在新产品上的努力。

仁宝的制造中心位于大陆的昆山及南京，有五座笔记型电脑制造厂、三座视讯产品制造厂、二座智能型手机制造厂及一座消费电子产品制造厂。2007年仁宝在越南设立海外第二生产基地，2008年因看好新兴市场需求成长，分别在波兰设立NB维修中心及巴西设立NB生产基地；2010年和2011年则配合客户西进需求，分别于四川成都与重庆设厂；2011年及2013年则分别购买Toshiba设立于墨西哥华伦斯城与波兰弗罗茨瓦经济特区Kobierzyce的液晶电视组装厂；为达到高产能、高品质的目标，仁宝运用高效率生产作业，健全的制造体系，配合精密的仪器，使得高生产良率的目标得以达成。仁宝深信品质第一的经营原则，因此我们不断的从制造过程中，收集完整的资料，做为突破改进的依据，并进而提出解决方案。除了快速出货外，仁宝完整落实严格的品管制度，生产的每一个阶段，均以精密的仪器，认真的态度，进行各项严谨完备的测试，以确定产品均能超越客户的期许。出货前，所有的产品更一再的经过确认，以保证品质由内到外的完美，现所属工厂已分别通过ISO-9001国际质量认证、ISO-14001国际环保认证及OHSAS 18000国际认证。仁宝在笔记型电脑及智能型行动装置方面，获得世界知名厂商的肯定，所生产的视讯产品也在资讯业界建立良好的形象。
