Name: Cairn Devices
Description:
Nous avons tous déjà eu un ordinateur portable que nous avons dû changer à cause d’une lenteur extrême ou d’une défaillance soudaine.

Pourtant, en faisant ça, nous jetons en réalité un PC qui est encore en grande partie fonctionnel.

Sommes-nous coupables ? Non, au contraire, à moins d’être experts, nous sommes aujourd’hui prisonniers de PC irréparables.

Voici pourquoi nous développons un ordinateur portable modulaire, dont l’objectif sera de pouvoir changer toutes les pièces du PC très facilement, sans être expert.

Pour que cette modularité soit accessible à tous, peu importe son niveau en informatique, nous avons développé des Blocs et des Mods :
➤ Blocs : Ce sont des composants internes amovibles, conçus pour être les plus accessibles possible, aucune vis n’est utilisée, et ils sont interchangeables d’une simple pression. Pour changer un bloc, il suffit d’appuyer sur un bouton, et le bloc s’enlève.
Plusieurs composants sont changeables dans nos blocs : Mémoire Vive, SSD, Processeur, Batterie, Carte Wi-Fi, Ventilateur, Clavier, TouchPad, Écran

➤ Mods: Module externe permettant de personnaliser son ordinateur. Ce sont des pièces externes, comme la Webcam, le HDMI, ou les haut-parleurs

L’utilisateur maîtrise sa machine au lieu d’être maîtrisé par elle, et c’est également pour cela que l’Open Source et le Logiciel Libre sont des valeurs fondatrices de Cairn Devices. Nous proposerons ainsi un système d’exploitation Open Source.

Pour participer à rendre l'informatique plus libre et durable, donnez-nous votre avis ici  https://framaforms.org/etude-de-marche-clavier-mecanique-1669122011

Merci à nos soutiens Français et Européens, à savoir l’incubateur SEMIA pôle d’excellence, la région Grand Est, l’Eurométropole de Strasbourg, Climate-KIC et C-Voucher.

There is an equally pressing demand for industry-standard platforms and simple-to-use tools to run existing applications with little or no modification.

Repurchase: Refreshtek offers great value for end-of-life technology, our Asset Disposition staff will provide the best solution for your retired IT equipment.

Name: The SSD Review
Description:
The SSD Review was officially launched and available to the public on March 28, 2010. The roots of the site can be traced back to August 29, 2007 when the Publisher, Les Tokar, published the first review of a solid state drive on the internet with his review of the Sandisk U5000 32Gb SLC SSD. As coincidence may have it, a website known as Notebook Review encouraged him to continue writing articles and several manufacturers from the USA, Korea, China and Japan, expressed interest in having their newly released products evaluated.

All original articles are published here at The SSD Review in order to assist in an understanding of how fast we are progressing in the world of SSD storage.  Les Tokar was able to further his knowledge of solid state drives through assisting companies in their endeavors to implement SSDs in their systems and has been called upon on 4 occasions to provide confidential reports with respect to upcoming SSD releases.

OUR MISSION

The SSD Review was started with the understanding that there needed to be a resource for which those new to SSDs could turn.  We have tried to accomplish this through the publishing of The Beginners and Buyers Guide To SSDs along with Optimization Guides for SSDs and Operating Systems.  Our hardware reviews are compiled in a fashion where they can further the knowledge of the reader rather than simply providing benchmark scores. The SSD Review will strive to present a setting where the SSD novice and veteran alike can visit time and time again for a continuous upgrading of the solid state drive expertise.

The SSD review has further tried to meet its objectives through implementation of The SSD Review Forum page.  We believe this will provide an avenue for all to express opinion, thoughts on the site and to seek immediate assistance with respect to the contents of the site when necessary. In short, it enables each and every reader a voice within the SSD community.

Name: iMobile Repair Centre
Description:
Company Overview

G Mobile Repair Centre was established in 2009 by George Hajipetrou and is a pioneer in the Independent Apple mobile device repair industry.  George has repaired over 45,000 iPhones and iPads over the last five years and has become a respected figure in the industry due to his technical excellence, professionalism and extremely quick turnaround times.  We are accredited to repair mobile devices for Cellsure (Pty) Ltd, Vodacom’s Insurance Company.  

In 2014, George brought three new partners on board, Lance Carr, Ian Brown and Vincent Imbriolo with a view to expanding operations.  The decision was also taken to change the name from G Mobile to iMobile indicating our exclusive focus on Apple products.

Our Value Proposition

iMobile services the Insurance Industry, Corporates and the General Public. 

What distinguishes us is the following:

•	Owner Manager Culture – “The Owners are the Technicians”.  We pride ourselves on technical excellence in the repair of iPhones and iPads.
•	gTool accreditation – we are the only Repair Centre in South Africa to be gTool authorised and accredited.  We pride ourselves on using these precision, best of breed tools to expertly repair iPhones and iPads.
•	Turnaround time – we guarantee a 48-hour turnaround when repairing a consignment of phones from an Insurer or Corporate.  For customers who visit our walk in centre, most repairs are completed within 20 minutes while they wait.
•	Guarantee – we provide a full year’s guarantee on every repair – the best in the business.  This indicates our confidence in our parts and service.
•	Convenience – we will collect consignments of repairs from our Insurance and Corporate clients and deliver once the repairs have been made, making doing business with us hassle free and easy.
•	Protecting your margin – we contribute to our Corporate and Insurance clients’ bottom lines by repairing iDevices that would otherwise need to be replaced at far greater cost.

Name: SilMinds
Description:
SilMinds offers innovative solutions for Decimal Floating Point (DFP) hardware acceleration. We are the first to introduce a library of IP core units that is compliant with IEEE 754-2008 standard.  In addition, we offer integrated hardware/software DFP acceleration products and custom solutions to bring our customers the highest levels of high performance and energy efficient computing.

Our patented DFP arithmetic technology serves various financial applications, characterized by intense DFP computations, in a wide range of financial sectors including core banking, telecoms call rating and billing, currency and stock exchange, real time payment processing, and more...
 
SilMinds coprocessor based accelerator cards (SilAx and SilAxPro) can be directly plugged into the server or the personal computer PCIe interface bus or the CPU Socket. The accelerators' core functions are implemented using reconfigurable FPGAs, offering full customization of the acceleration solution in terms of both computation profile and throughput. The speedup factors achieved through SilAx DFP accelerators promise unprecedented energy and total cost of ownership savings for financial data centers.

Name: Lightfleet Corporation
Description:
Lightfleet Corporation is a privately held technology company founded in 2003 and located in Camas, Washington.  Lightfleet has been developing a new, faster and more efficient way to connect essentially unlimited numbers of computers together.  It will allow the vast numbers of computers now in use in the cloud, big data, big computing, server farms, high performance computing (HPC), super-computing and secure applications to communicate faster, be used more efficiently, and work more securely.

Lightfleet’s Multiflo Data Distribution System (DDS) is based on the new concept of Self-Directed Data Flow. Multiflo accomplishes the same basic functions as a traditional switched fabric, but does so more efficiently and with lower latency. Unlike those fabrics, the native mode for data movement in the Multiflo architecture is multicast.

Name: Finchetto
Description:
To unlock the full potential of AI, we must make data centres more energy efficient. Data centres consume 2% of all global electricity – and powering sufficient compute is the single greatest challenge for AI today.
 
At Finchetto, we're on a mission to significantly reduce data centre energy use and accelerate cluster performance with the world’s first fully-optical passive network switch.
 
Network switches are the workhorses of every data centre. And they are power hungry, accounting for 20% of a data centre's total energy use. Compared to today's state-of-the-art switches, Finchetto reduces power requirement by up to 26x while reducing latency by up 40x. 
 
Super low power. Ultra low latency. Lightspeed packet switching. Massive throughput. 
 
Finchetto makes light work of AI.

We excel at the intersection of computer hardware and architectures, novel programming paradigms, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and algorithms, and we apply our skills to domain-specific science goals. The application domains we embrace include reliable and secure, i.e., “resilient,” computer architectures for safety-critical domains (e.g., automotive, aerospace, railways, and in general safety-critical infrastructures) and advanced and holistic computing techniques for knowledge discovery in Complex Systems for Life Sciences (e.g., bioinformatics, systems, and computational biology, bio fabrication, brain dynamics, etc.). 

The heterogeneity of the background of our members and the multi-disciplinary aim of our group is our key strength. We strongly believe that contamination of solutions from very different domains is the crucial driver of innovation, and we apply this paradigm every day in our research.

Name: LENCRE

Il était une fois, une petite entreprise française nommée Lencre 

Lencre s'est donnée pour mission de changer la façon dont nous achetons des cartouches d'encre et des toners pour nos imprimantes.
 
Benoît, le fondateur de l'entreprise, a constaté que les cartouches d'encre et les toners étaient incroyablement coûteux, et qu'ils produisaient une grande quantité de déchets électroniques qui nuisaient à notre environnement.

 Les cartouches d'encre et les toners sont souvent des dépenses incontournables pour de nombreux particuliers ... 

... surtout pour ceux qui travaillent à domicile ou qui ont besoin d'imprimer régulièrement des documents pour leur travail ou leurs études.

 Le coût élevé de ces consommables peut être une source de douleur financière pour les consommateurs, qui peuvent ...

... se sentir pris au piège et obligés de dépenser une fortune pour maintenir leur équipement d'impression en bon état de fonctionnement.

 Benoît a décidé de créer Lencre 

Pour offrir aux particuliers une alternative abordable et écologique aux cartouches d'encre et aux toners traditionnels. 

 Il a commencé par réunir une équipe de professionnels expérimentés dans la collecte, le nettoyage, la réparation, et le reconditionnement de cartouches d'encre et de toners !

Leur expertise a permis de garantir que chaque cartouche d'encre et toner reconditionné vendu par Lencre était de qualité supérieure.

En réutilisant et en recyclant les cartouches d'encre et les toners vides nous contribuons à la protection de l'environnement, ce qui réduit les déchets électroniques et les émissions de gaz à effet de serre. 

Et tout ça avec une garantie 100% satisfait ou remboursé.

Vous pouvez non seulement économiser de l'argent, mais aussi contribuer à la protection de la planète.

 Commandez dès maintenant et découvrez pourquoi  Lencre est le choix Numéro 1 pour les cartouches d'encre et les toners.

Name: Ascenium AS
Description:
Ascenium’s compiler-driven General Purpose Accelerator (Aptos) is a real challenger to all existing general-purpose CPU technology. It accelerates all generic code and is 100% source-code compatible with industry-standard LLVM compiler, coupled with a novel CPU architecture.

Join us in reinventing the future of general-purpose computing!

What We Do
We design the next-generation data center CPU and Processor block, challenging Intel’s x86 architecture and monopoly. RISC-V and Arm ISA compatibility on steroids, running circles around incumbent suppliers today

Why We Do It
The global need for a lower CO2 footprint drives our mission. Data centers currently consume energy equivalent to international air traffic – about 200 TWh yearly and increasing.

According to all independent sources, more energy-efficient CPUs are the key solution to significantly reducing CO2 footprint in data centers.

Working at Ascenium
At Ascenium, we believe in hiring exceptional individuals, setting clear priorities, and empowering our team members to thrive. We find that our approach not only makes sense form a business perspective but is also highly valued by our engineers.

Join the team? Read more at:

Name: Cell Tech Inc.
Description:
Cell Tech started in 2010 as a small cell phone repair shop, grounded in quality service, quick repairs, and a customer-first approach. This foundation proved valuable when a local school approached Cell Tech, asking if its core values could extend to school device repairs. Ready to take on the challenge, Cell Tech built a dedicated workshop and a team of trained technicians. To support these operations, Cell Tech's development team created "Repair Genie," a custom repair management system that streamlined the entire repair process.

Over time, Cell Tech’s tailored repair services and innovative software met and exceeded client expectations, allowing the company to expand. Today, with workshops across Virginia, North Carolina and South Carolina. We today cater to 200+ schools supporting over 200K students while adapting to the evolving needs of educational institutions while upholding its original commitment to quality, efficiency, and customer delight.

Cell Tech is and always will be dedicated to providing service with our initial values: quality repairs, a quick turnaround time, and a customer-first focus.

The name "Fog Hashing" originates from the concept of "Fog Computing," introduced by Cisco in 2011, poised to play a significant role in the digital world of the future.

Od pierwszego dnia kluczem do naszego sukcesu jest konsekwentny rozwój wysokiej jakości produktów w przystępnej cenie a także niezwykli ludzie biorący udział we wszystkich etapach planowania, w procesie produkcji i dalszych. Ta filozofia jest nadal kluczowa dla wszystkiego, co tworzymy. Nasze badania i rozwój oparte są na koncepcji tworzenia produktu przyjaznego dla użytkowników. 
 
Wykorzystywanie najnowszych technologii to także istotny element naszego procesu produkcyjnego. Globalne zasoby zapewniły nam wzrost konkurencyjności bez uszczerbku dla jakości i funkcjonalności. 
 
Nowe produkty wprowadzamy na rynek dopiero, gdy zyskujemy pewność, że odpowiadają najwyższym standardom użytkowania i zachowują najlepszy stosunek jakości do ceny.

Name: Joy Systems
Description:
Joy Systems is Microsoft's Premium and most awarded Refurbished Partner. Based out New Jersey, our refurbishing facility processes over 50,000 PCs per month with over 5 Million PCs refurbished to date. We are a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner and a pioneer in the refurbishing space partnering with Microsoft to implement the Microsoft Authorized Refurbisher program.

Since our inception back in 2001, Joy Systems has spent the last 20 years working with Microsoft to create the standard as to what buying a refurbished product should be for businesses. We first started in displays selling CRT monitors but quickly expanded into PC desktops, laptops and accessories. Now in 2022, we set our goals on reaching more customers than ever by utilizing our Family Values and years of experience.

Our partnership with Microsoft has allowed us to not only grow as a company, but to grow the entire Microsoft Refurbished business as well. Throughout the years, we have received numerous awards from Microsoft for our dedication to quality, service and customer wins. Our most recent award was for selling over 2.5 Million MAR Licenses. An achievement that to this date, has not been achieved by any other refurbisher in the world.

All of our PCs are quality-certified and go through a rigorous refurbishment process where each unit is tested in all facets and restored to a new-like state. We follow strict requirements to ensure you receive a high-quality, professionally refurbished device installed with genuine Microsoft windows. All our Grade A refurbished PCs comes standard with a 1 Year warranty with up to 5 years available. 

The buying experience is crucial to that. Offering a product that is readily available to purchase, backed by quality and service standards while still meeting your budget is what we strive for. We are doing our part to build a better planet by giving these PCs a second life and helping to build a circular economy.

Name: NHPCHELP
Description:
I am offering to refurbish older computers in order to give them to people across NH who are blind and in need.

Here is what I am offering:

 

I will replace defective parts in a computer with parts that I find from other “dead” computers and some odds and ends that I have gathered over the years.
 

I will format the existing hard drive to ensure that the original data has been destroyed.
 

I will reinstall the existing operating system from scratch or I will install a fresh copy of an open source OS.
 

I will install and configure open source/free accessible software for the blind user.
 

I will install and configure open source/free software to allow for productivity and enjoyment by the new owner.

Name: Evoluent Ltd
Description: In 1994, a revolutionary ergonomic mouse was invented and patented by Jack Lo due to discomfort he had when using a conventional mouse. His invention was the first mouse to support a hand in a fully upright handshake position for eliminating the arm twisting required by ordinary mice.Years of effort in trying to license the invention to several of the largest mouse companies only resulted in rejections.A firm belief in the idea compelled Jack and Ping to exhibit a slightly more developed prototype at Comdex 2001 in Las Vegas. The highly enthusiastic public response encouraged him to manufacture and distribute the mouse himself.Funded only by his own savings, Jack had to do everything himself, including creating the industrial design, package design, web site, brochures, ads, etc. He went to Asia and found a contract manufacturer to produce the mouse.Many months of collaborative work with the factory culminated in the release of the first Evoluent VerticalMouse in late 2002. After product introduction,Jack handled PR, sales and tech support while Ping processed and shipped the orders.The VerticalMouse received many raving press reviews and took the Ergonomic world by storm.

Description:

We list equipment with which we have great depth of knowledge, experience, and contacts. Whether you see it on our site or not, we enjoy the challenge of helping you with your most vexing problems. 

New AND Surplus AND Refurbished  AKA The "Life-Cycle": 
Equipment specifications are constantly changing. In this change is the opportunity to take advantage of significant price deterioration. As models are introduced, prior releases are discounted continually until reaching obsolescence. The typical equipment vendor discontinues products once the price point declines to a predetermined level. We fill a niche by offering quality, brand name computer hardware throughout the entire life of the equipment. New, then surplus, then refurbished- "The Equipment Life Cycle"

 We offer: 

 Printers 

 Printer parts 

 Printer connectivity products such as 
 Ethernet 
 Token Ring 
 Twinax 
 Coax

 Printer supplies and consumables including toner, printheads, ribbons, rollers, and much more

Name: Total Data
Description:
Total Data blei starta i juni 2000.I starten var vi rein nettbutikk, med salg til store delar av landet. Vi var aktivt med i pristestar frå landsdekkande nettaviser, blant anna DinSide.no. Her fekk vi gang på gang tittelen «Beste PC-Kjøp!». Firmaet vokste fort, og vi blei raskt kjent i lokalområdet etter mykje positiv mediedekning.

I 2004 starta vi butikk i Hafstadvegen i Førde, og hadde tilhald der fram til høsten 2016. Då flytta vi til større og betre lokaler i Angedalsvegen 4.

Frå 2004 satsa vi meir og meir på lokale kunder då vi såg at «gulltida» vår på nettsalg var over då Komplett, Multicom m.fl. kom skikkelig på banen. Desse hadde» «ubegrensa» kapital i bakhand for reklame, og det vart då vanskelig for eit lite firma frå Førde å konkurrere. På svært kort tid snudde vi omsetninga frå 90% nettsalg til 90% lokal salg. Vi bygde stein for stein med å levere lav pris, god service og vise våre kundar at vi satt inne med stor kunnskap. Etter dette har vi bygd oss opp eit godt kundegrunnlag med privatkundar og små og mellomstore bedrifter i Sogn og Fjordane.

Total Data er godkjent lærebedrift i IKT Servicefaget og Dataelektronikarfaget.

Vår visjon er å vere «den lokale dataleverandøren, men same lave prisar som på internett!»

HydroDrip is a business to business (B2B) hardware and software company that allows water companies to deliver water through water machines that give users an integrated payment system for recurring water in our digital wallet called “HydroWallet”

Our mission is to replace every single-use plastic bottle with a refillable container worldwide.

The world produces 381 millions of plastic waste yearly-This is set to double by 2024. 50% of this is single-use plastic and only 9% has ever been recycled. 88% of the sea’s surface is polluted by plastic waste.

HydroWallet technology combines card payment system and water metering system to automate water refill stations. In a nutshell, the system transforms water refill stations into a water vending machine.

We want to drive the adoption of refillable containers by offering better experience to consumers as well as helping private water companies to scale their water delivery.

We are developing this solution for water companies that provide water through refill stations in different townships and urban communities.

Name: ConnectedView GmbH
Description:
Hello, we are ConnectedView and we invented the world's first screenbuddy!
As a visionary young start-up from Wuppertal, we strive to simplify your lives and build the best possible working environment by adding our award-winning innovation to your set-ups. 

You spend a lot of time working or gaming in front of a computer and are lucky to use multiple monitors? Awesome! But isn't it annoying - that unpleasant gap between screens that no matter what you do won't disappear. 

Let's change that!

We came up with a long lasting solution. The screenbuddy connects multiple monitors with a single snap. Once you have set your ideal position, you never have to worry about readjusting again. The screenbuddy guarantees a perfect alignment every single time and doesn't take up your whole morning. The relief of your eyes, neck and back allows you to maintain a higher degree of concentration and you can fully focus on your work.

The underlying technology is based on a simple concept: The screenbuddy is made of two wings that attach to the monitors you choose to connect. Thanks to the innovative and patented magnet technology, the wings ensure that both displays are kept in place seamlessly. This removes the need for complicated display synchronisation in the future.

Thus, our services aim to more effectively spread their use in the world market, offering a new alternative to electronic payments to the end customer.

In addition to receiving electronic payments, EletroPay has one more differential, the support for cryptocurrencies. While the concept of cryptocurrencies is new to many people, they are becoming an increasingly popular payment method.

Our main mission is to facilitate payments through cryptocurrencies, without the need to use mobile phones or computers, being the pioneer in innovating with their payment machines.

Electronic payments are those made by reading a code - known as QRCode, something that is already very used in many countries, including companies like Visa and Mastercard.


In addition to receiving electronic payments, EletroPay has one more differential, the support for cryptocurrencies. While the concept of cryptocurrencies is new to many people, they are becoming an increasingly popular payment method.

Caseking was founded in Berlin in 2003 and has quickly grown to become a leading supplier of products for PC enthusiasts across Europe. We first opened our UK facility in 2012 and moved to a brand new logistics centre in Stoke-on-Trent in 2023.

By understanding the enthusiast market, Caseking has built a reputation as experts in chassis, modding, cooling, PC tuning and gaming. We work closely with vendors on product design, marketing and channel management, with many on an exclusive basis.

Caseking is a distribution business within Pro Gamers Group, a leader in the gaming industry. Our product and service offerings have expanded around the globe.


OUR PHILOSOPHY
Caseking’s philosophy from the very start was a very unique product range, highly professional, transparent, fast processing and superb service.

Only when our customers are completely satisfied, we can be satisfied too!

For this reason Caseking invested not only in expanding its product portfolio, but also in logistics and offices across Europe.

Customer service is a key component of our continued success and our new facility in Staffordshire provides a central base to support the UK market.

Name: Cadware.nl
Description:
Cadware is an innovative company that supplies high performance systems specifically for CAD applications. With more than 25 years of experience in the CAD and PLM industry, we can tell you exactly which system best suits your CAD applications. 

Customer satisfaction is our top priority. Our service also goes further than with most other suppliers. As an extra service, we install your applications on the workstation before delivery, so that you can get started right away. In the unlikely event that something is not in order after delivery, we will repair it quickly and professionally. 

Our innovation: Hardware and software are constantly changing. We continue to research new technologies and adapt our systems to them where necessary. In our knowledge center we also develop software that measures the performance of various CAD operations. With this knowledge we can continuously improve our systems so that you can expect the best possible performance. 

Our products: Anyone who works with CAD software knows that waiting a long time is an integral part of the job. The hardware has to make a lot of 3D calculations and standard workstations are not set up for this. Cadware supplies systems that reduce waiting times by 40 to 60% and are also whisper-quiet. 

At first, drawing and design programs seem the same, but beneath the surface there are major differences. For one program it is very important to have a fast processor, for the other it is especially important that you can work with multiple cores. In addition, it also matters how the various components of the workstation work in relation to each other. Those who really want to have an optimal system for their work should therefore also consider the different combinations. Cadware is happy to advise you.

Name: EVITAR ApS
Description:
EVITAR ApS hjælper dansk erhverv med markedets bedste priser på hardware, software samt IT konsulenter, og bevarer den gode personlige service uden at det går ud over prisen. 

Hos EVITAR ønsker vi at være en del af IT-afdelingen i virksomheden.
Hos os kan vi levere alt fra det simple kabel til den store komplekse infrastruktur-løsning. 

Når I som kunde hos EVITAR har en udfordring, som kan være stor som lille, så skal I vide at I roligt kan komme til os og vi sørger for at løse den. 
Vi kan klare mange ting selv – men nogle gange må vi også bare erkende at behovet for specialister er nødvendigt. Her er det så godt at vi har et kæmpe netværk af samarbejdspartnere, som vi kan trække på til at hjælpe os med at løse den specifikke opgave. Intet er for stort, intet er for småt.

EVITAR samarbejder med verdens førende it-producenter. Det betyder, at vi kan sammensætte de bedste it-løsninger til det offentlige og private erhverv, hvilket resulterer i forhøjet produktivitet såvel som i øget arbejdsglæde.

Name: Brain Technology Spa
Description:
Soluzioni avanzate per un mondo che cambia

  Il Brain Technology è la capogruppo di una serie di società impegnate nella distribuzione di prodotti informatici e di illuminazione e nella fornitura alle aziende di un ampio ventaglio di servizi ad alto contenuto tecnologico di comunicazione integrata in ambito Internet, di assistenza tecnica informatica e di consulenza aziendale.
 
L' offerta del gruppo 

  Le profonde sinergie strutturali e organizzative che legano ogni società specializzata sono tra i principali punti di forza del gruppo. Queste si traducono in un servizio qualitativamente all'avanguardia per ogni tipo di cliente, dall'end-user al professionista, dall'appassionato di informatica alla grande azienda. 

Del gruppo Brain Technology fanno parte:
 - Computer Care srl: servizi di assistenza informatica ad utenti privati e pubblici. E' centro di assistenza autorizzata Apple. La divisione TalentBox si occupa di formazione informatica.
 - Playnet Srl: servizi di comunicazione integrata via Internet
 - eMall Srl: commercio elettronico di prodotti Hi-tech attraverso www.eMall.it e distribuzione di prodotti informatici ad operatori del settore
 - Dixplay Srl: produzione e distribuzione prodotti di illuminazione a tecnologia LED con marchio Dixplay e Wight per uso domestico, navale e camperistico.
 - AFB Srl: Servizi di supporto operativo per le aziende del gruppo e incubatore per nuove attività d'impresa con servizi tecnici e di consulenza

Name: OCTOLAB
Description:
Octolab is your new partner for the development, engineering and production of electronic devices, targeting business-to-business and business-to-consumer markets.

THE BEST TECHNOLOGIES AT YOUR DISPOSAL
Octolab team, leveraging a 30+ years expertise, will propose you the best technologies to suit your use case.
Wether it’s the industrial, medical, lighting or automotive market, we will be able to guide you building around your specific requirements. 

FROM PROTOTYPING TO MASS PRODUCTION
You’ve realized a prototype using Raspberry or Arduino technologies and now you want to move forward to mass production? Do you need a custom carrier board for a System on Module (SOM)? We have the competences to industrialize it and make sure your product can be produced efficiently, taking also care of the relevant certification if needed.

SPEC OPS
Leveraging an extensive experience in the security and identification markets, we are ready to develop your special products and applications. Special materials, miniaturization, biometrics and sensors are the technologies that allows us creating unique devices, sharpened for your specific application.

Name: Comtronix Industrial Computers
Description:
Located in Fort Myers Florida, Comtronix is dedicated to delivering, manufacturing, and maintaining reliable industrial computers. Our team has over 20 years of experience in the industrial computer industry. Focusing on our strengths, customers, and the underlying values they expect; while utilizing a consultative solution selling approach form the foundation for our team to provide superior product and support services.

Comtronix does more than design and build the industry’s most complete lineup of rugged, reliable and versatile equipment. We work with our customers to understand their challenges, to know their unique situations and then leverage our engineering and industry-leading alliance partners to help our customers create a total solution that harmonizes with their networks, platforms and processes. Our collaborative, connected approach ensures a more complete and seamless implementation whether your needs are for industrial embedded computers, panel pc’s, rackmount servers, rugged tablet computers or industrial barcode scanners.
